categoryCityContent.description: Check {{count}} current {{categoryPlural}} job offers in {{city}} ({{voivodeship}} voivodeship). Compare positions, salaries and work mode to choose the offer that fits your needs. You can also browse other job categories in {{city}}.
categoryCityContent.descriptionEmpty: There are no {{categoryPlural}} job offers in {{city}} ({{voivodeship}} voivodeship) yet. Browse other job categories in {{city}} or add your own job offer - be the first to reach candidates looking for {{categoryPlural}} work in this area.

q1.answer: Salaries in {{categoryPlural}} in {{city}} depend on the position, experience, scope of duties and work mode. Check {{count}} current job offers on do-pracy.pl to compare salary ranges and find the best option. Many offers allow salary negotiation directly with the employer.
q1.question: How much can you earn in {{categoryPlural}} in {{city}}?

q2.answer: Currently in {{city}} there are {{count}} {{categoryPlural}} job offers available - from junior to senior positions. The offers cover various companies in {{city}} and surrounding areas. You can filter results by city, job category and work mode (on-site, remote, hybrid).
q2.question: How many {{categoryPlural}} job offers are available in {{city}}?

q3.answer: Remote and hybrid work ({{categoryPlural}}) is available for selected offers marked with the relevant work mode. Some positions in {{categoryPlural}} in {{city}} are offered on-site. Check the work mode filter on the offers page.
q3.question: Can I work remotely in {{categoryPlural}} in {{city}}?

q4.answer: Yes. do-pracy.pl is a job board where both companies and recruiters can add {{categoryPlural}} job offers in {{city}} and other cities. Create an account and add a job offer - you will reach candidates actively looking for employment.
q4.question: Can I add my own {{categoryPlural}} job offer in {{city}}?

q5.answer: To contact the employer of a {{categoryPlural}} job offer in {{city}}, open the selected job offer and click the button to apply or reveal the contact details. Contacting employers is free for candidates - no commission or hidden fees.
q5.question: How do I contact the employer of a {{categoryPlural}} job offer in {{city}}?

q1.answer: In {{city}} there are {{count}} current job offers across many categories: IT, sales, marketing, finance and accounting, HR, administration, customer service, logistics and transport, production, construction, hospitality, healthcare, education, engineering and law. Check all categories and choose the one you are interested in.
q1.question: What kind of work can I look for in {{city}}?

q2.question: How much can you earn working in {{city}}?

q3.answer: Yes. do-pracy.pl is a job board - you can add your own job offer in {{city}}. Create an account, describe the position, add the requirements and publish. Your job offer will reach candidates actively searching for employment in {{city}}.
q3.question: Can I add my own job offer in {{city}}?

q4.question: Can I filter job offers by district in {{city}}?
